reviews.comment:
Renovada y muy linda!
Prohibido perderse los sandwichs de pan casero, manteca, crudo y queso, un CLÁSICO del Chubut!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Renovated and very nice!
Don't miss the homemade bread sandwiches with butter, ham, and cheese—a Chubut classic!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5eDZqaWlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Aunque a veces en baja temporada hay menos personal, hoy todos los estacioneros estaban laburando a full y con buena onda organizando el lío de autos. Por la pandemia, hay que respetar la cantidad de personas para entrar al mini mercado. Si están de paso por Chubut y aunque tengan el tanque con resto, paren y no se priven del "sanguche" de pan casero, crudo y queso. Es casi una institución.

(Translated by Google)
Although there are sometimes fewer staff during the off-season, today all the station attendants were working hard and in good spirits, organizing the traffic jam. Due to the pandemic, the number of people allowed inside the convenience store must be respected. If you're passing through Chubut, even if your tank is full, stop by and don't miss out on the homemade bread sandwich with ham and cheese. It's practically a tradition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bTZtTERREAE

reviews.comment:
En época de temporada alta y fines de semana larga tienen que tener más personas en la playa, los baños de mujeres sucios, pero había una persona limpiando ... La gente no cuida.

(Translated by Google)
During peak season and long weekends, there must be more people on the beach, the women's restrooms were dirty, but there was one person cleaning... People don't care.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bThIVlNREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Lo mejor de la estacion los sanguchitos.
Los baños una mugre todos inundados y un olor podrido terrible.
Te queres lavar las manos y no anda el agua.
Tampoco hay alcohol en gel.

(Translated by Google)
The best thing about the station was the sandwiches.
The bathrooms were filthy, all flooded, and had a terrible rotten smell.
You want to wash your hands and the water doesn't work.
There's no hand sanitizer either.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cWVtb2NBEAE
